title: Read-only independent review
summary: One or two independent read-only lanes for risk or design review.
useWhen: A design or risk question needs independent read-only analysis

phases.intent: Dispatch one or two read-only lanes with the same review question.
adaptations: Use one lane if the question is narrow

phases.intent: Observe each read-only lane via run_wait until terminal.
adaptations: No stop needed for read-only runaway

phases.intent: Lead reads independent outputs and forms a judgment.
adaptations: Escalate only if outputs disagree on a named risk

escalation.advisor: Only for one named unresolved semantic or risk question.
escalation.auditor: Only for one named residual high-risk question.
